data.title: RaveDAO refutes manipulation amid Binance, Bitget probes into RAVE trading; denies role in coin's surge & crash.
data.description: RaveDAO has denied any involvement in the sudden surge and subsequent crash of the RAVE token price. Both Binance and Bitget are currently conducting investigations into potential market manipulation. The price of the RAVE token experienced a significant increase followed by a sharp decline, prompting concerns and scrutiny. RaveDAO's representatives have refuted any accusations of wrongdoing related to the price fluctuations, as the exchanges delve into the situation.

data.title: Schneider Electric assists industry in transforming challenges into strategic advantages with cutting-edge solutions.
data.description: In recent reports, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.3% in the United States, marking a significant improvement from the previous month. This change reflects the addition of 450,000 new jobs in various sectors, including manufacturing, healthcare, and technology. Economists attribute this positive trend to increased consumer spending and business investments. Additionally, the stock market has seen a notable uptick, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising by 700 points. Overall, these indicators suggest a promising economic outlook for the nation.

data.title: Execs from Charles Schwab and Citadel Securities consider entering prediction markets, avoiding sports bets.
data.description: Officials at Charles Schwab and Citadel Securities have expressed interest in prediction markets, with each company showing a desire to distance themselves from sports-related offerings.

data.title: Judge rules in Caitlyn Jenner's favor, dismissing class lawsuit over memecoin. Token not deemed unregistered security.
data.description: A federal judge has dismissed a class action lawsuit concerning Caitlyn Jenner's memecoin. The judge ruled that the lawsuit failed to provide sufficient evidence that the token was an unregistered security.

data.title: 10x Genomics Introduces Atera, a New Platform to Redefine How Biology is Measured and Understood
data.description: A breakthrough technology allowing for whole-transcriptome in situ spatial biology with single-cell sensitivity at scale was unveiled at the 2026 AACR Annual Meeting. The technology showcased data from top research institutions, such as the June Lab at the Perelman School of Medicine, University of Pennsylvania, and the German Cancer Research Institute. This innovation marks a significant advancement in analyzing gene expression patterns with individual cell precision on a large scale, revolutionizing the field of spatial biology.

data.title: TTW Unveils Top 50 Airlines in the World for 2026
data.description: Travel And Tour World (TTW) has released its detailed global aviation report for 2026, revealing the Top 50 Airlines worldwide. This research delves into the key players influencing international travel and passenger movement. The report sheds light on an evolving industry landscape, analyzing trends and developments shaping the sector.

data.title: Senator Warren accuses SEC Chair Atkins of misleading Congress on enforcement data.
data.description: Senator Elizabeth Warren has accused SEC chairman Paul Atkins of potentially misleading Congress regarding the agency's enforcement actions. Warren alleges that Atkins may have intentionally provided false information to Congress.

data.title: A Pioneer in the Firearms Industry: Anthony Imperato Honored by NRA
data.description: On April 17, 2026, Anthony Imperato, the CEO of Henry Repeating Arms, was honored with the NRA Golden Bullseye Pioneer Award at the 2026 National Rifle Association Annual Meetings & Exhibits in Houston, Texas. The award was presented by Editor-in-Chief Mark. This prestigious recognition was given during the event in front of numerous attendees and industry professionals.

data.title: BREAKTHROUGH PRIZE ANNOUNCES 2026 LAUREATES
data.description: Six remarkable prizes worth $3 million each have been granted for exceptional advancements in the fields of life sciences, fundamental physics, and mathematics. These groundbreaking achievements include gene therapies addressing inherited blindness, sickle cell disease, and beta-thalassemia. Moreover, the identification of a critical genetic factor related to ALS and frontotemporal dementia has been acknowledged. Additionally, a significant breakthrough in precision measurement techniques has been recognized as part of these prestigious awards.

data.title: Definium Therapeutics Applauds White House Executive Order to Accelerate Mental Health Innovation and Expand Access to Psychedelic Medical Treatments
data.description: A late-stage clinical biopharmaceutical company, Definium Therapeutics, Inc., released a statement in support of the recent White House Executive Order. The order focuses on speeding up research, development, and access to new treatments for severe mental illnesses, such as emerging psychedelic medications. Definium is dedicated to addressing the root causes of psychiatric and neurological disorders.

data.title: Breakthrough Prize Foundation Announces Winner of the 11th Annual Breakthrough Junior Challenge
data.description: 18-year-old Matea Cañizarez from Quito, Ecuador has been awarded $400,000 in education prizes for her exceptional video elucidating Quark-Gluon Plasma. The Breakthrough Prize Foundation revealed this news, recognizing her outstanding work.

data.title: Californian couple sentenced to jail for staging bear attacks on luxury cars, scamming over $141,000 from insurers.
data.description: State officials in California have reported that residents managed to obtain over $141,000 in insurance payments by orchestrating fake bear attacks on their high-end vehicles.

data.title: Penn Medicine, Children's Hospital of Philadelphia team awarded Breakthrough Prize for developing gene therapy for inherited blindness
data.description: In Los Angeles on April 18, 2026, an award-winning breakthrough was recognized in the field of science. The discovery originated from a pack of blind canines housed at a veterinary school. This achievement culminated in the receipt of the esteemed Breakthrough Prize, known as the "Oscars of Science." Leading the efforts were Jean Bennett, MD, and Albert Maguire, MD, both holding emeritus titles.

data.title: Tesla Robotaxi Service Expands To Dallas And Houston
data.description: Over the weekend, Tesla revealed its plans to extend its "robotaxi" service to Dallas and Houston, marking the addition of these two cities to the roster after previously launching in Austin and the San Francisco Bay area. This expansion showcases Tesla's ongoing efforts to broaden its reach in the autonomous vehicle sector.

data.title: Largest DeFi hack of 2026 sees $293M drained from Kelp DAO's rsETH bridge, causing cascading crisis with nine protocols affected.
data.description: An attacker was able to drain $293 million from the rsETH bridge associated with Kelp by converting the stolen funds into ETH. In response to this incident, Aave took action by freezing markets, leading to a cascading effect on nine protocols within the DeFi space. This situation has caused a significant impact on the affected platforms.

data.title: $293M drained in attack on kelp restaking platform, causing "cross-protocol contagion" affecting 9 crypto protocols -Cyvers.
data.description: According to blockchain security firm Cyvers, an attack has resulted in what they term as a "cross-protocol contagion" affecting a minimum of nine cryptocurrency protocols.

data.title: California man faces charges for Lego theft, swapping pieces with pasta in $34,000 scheme: police.
data.description: A man residing in California faced charges of grand theft as the authorities revealed he obtained around $34,000 through a deceptive scheme, which an official described as a remarkable "pasta-and-switch" tactic involving Lego kits.

data.title: Solana futures open interest up 20% this week: $100 SOL potential next stop amid market recovery.
data.description: As the cryptocurrency market continues to recover, SOL has shown a consistent upward trend, leading traders to speculate that the altcoin could reach $100 next.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Shows Its Strength; Nvidia, Palantir Make These Moves (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase following unexpected inflation data. Google's stock reached an early purchasing point. In the latest stock market update, the Nasdaq demonstrated its strength, with notable movements from companies like Nvidia and Palantir.

data.title: Geron Corporation Reports Inducement Grant Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On April 14, 2026, in Foster City, California, Geron Corporation (Nasdaq: GERN) announced an equity award to Timothy Williams, their newly appointed Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer, and Corporate Secretary. This award takes the form of a stock option enabling the purchase of 2,500,000 shares of Geron common stock. The grant was made to secure William's commitment to joining Geron as a senior executive.
